title: Dougie
description: Versatile two-column theme that carries both a microblog timeline and a long-form publication on the same site. Configurable sidebar with profile, social links, From the Blog, Recent Publications, and RSS. Two visual variants — Default (clean editorial) and Starfield Dreams (animated dark). All branding, CTAs, social links, and the share strip are per-site fields — same theme, multiple sites, no forking.

fields.label: Site bio / tagline
fields.placeholder: One-line tagline shown under the site title.

fields.label: Profile / brand image URL
fields.placeholder: Absolute URL to a circular profile photo or square brand mark.

fields.label: Show social links in sidebar + footer
